## stdout

## stderr
cctally: stats.db is at version 99 but this cctally only knows up to 13. A newer/unreleased cctally likely touched this data dir. Run `cctally db recover --db stats` to revert it to the known schema head (cache.db is re-derivable and recovers without --yes; stats.db needs --yes and may require a re-record afterward).
## exit
2
